header.title: Profile
header.description: Your personal information. Editable any time.

locale.footnote: Your personal amounts follow your currency. The interface is translated into the language you pick; languages without a complete translation fall back to English. The LIBERIA subscription is billed in CHF.
locale.unsupported: Country / currency / language combination not supported yet.

header.title: Settings
header.description: Tune your preferences and manage your data.

memory.intro: LIBERIA learns your profile to support you better.
memory.introSub: These preferences stay private and never leave your account. You can edit or wipe them any time.
memory.toneHelp: The tone LIBERIA uses when speaking to you.
memory.challengesHelp: Pick what resonates. Helps LIBERIA guide you better.
memory.triggersHelp: The moments when you spend more than planned.
memory.notesHelp: What you want LIBERIA to keep in mind about your trajectory. Only visible to you.
memory.notesPlaceholder: e.g. "I'm coming out of a rough patch, I need to move slowly."
memory.resetConfirm: Reset your coaching memory? Your financial data stays intact — only personalisation preferences are cleared.

weekly.title: Weekly summary email
weekly.description: Every Sunday, a short recap of your financial week.

encouragement.title: Progress encouragement
encouragement.description: A short email when the coach detects notable progress.

milestones.title: Goal milestones
milestones.description: When a goal hits a tier (50 / 80 / 100%).

inactivity.title: Coach follow-up
inactivity.description: A gentle email after several inactive days.

trial.title: Trial and payment reminders
trial.description: Before the trial ends and on payment issues. Recommended.

analytics.title: Anonymous product analytics
analytics.description: Aggregated counters (never personal) to improve LIBERIA. No resale, no ad tracking.

subscription.intro: Manage your plan, billing and Premium access.

data.intro: Per GDPR, you can export or permanently delete all your data.
data.exportInfo: The export contains profile, income, expenses, goals, AI plans and conversation history.
data.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete your LIBERIA account? This action is irreversible and wipes all your data (income, expenses, goals, AI plans, conversations).

security.intro: Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Each user only accesses their own data — strict isolation enforced at the database layer.

header.title: Subscription
header.description: Manage your trial, plan and payment method.

banners.trialTitleWithDays: Free trial in progress — {days, plural, one {# day left} other {# days left}}
banners.trialBillingSoon: Automatic billing will start when the trial ends.
banners.trialCancelled: You've cancelled: no invoice will be charged.
banners.trialCanCancel: You can cancel any time via the portal.
banners.activeKeptUntilFallback: Your access continues until the end of the period.
banners.activeManaged: You can manage your subscription any time.
banners.pastDueBody: The last payment didn't go through. Update your payment method via the portal to reactivate access — your data stays safe.
banners.lapsedPausedBody: Pick a plan to reactivate full LIBERIA access. Your data stays intact.
banners.lapsedNewBody: Activate your {days}-day free trial. Cancel any time.

status.label: Current plan
status.trialUsedNote: You've already used your free trial. Future plans start at the standard rate.
status.freshNote: Start with {days} free days. Card required to activate.
status.manageNote: You can change plan or cancel any time via the portal.

timeline.title: Account activity
timeline.cancelScheduledDetail: You can revoke it via the portal while the period is running.

subscription.footnote: Billing in CHF for launch, whatever your country. Payment handled by Stripe (encrypted, PCI-compliant). Accepted methods: Visa / Mastercard / American Express cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and TWINT (Switzerland, depending on Stripe Dashboard activation).

coach.welcomeBody: Talk about your finances. The LIBERIA coach uses your income, expenses and goals to suggest concrete actions — calmly, without jargon, without promise.

chat.placeholderDemo: Demo mode: create an account to chat with the coach.
chat.disclaimer: The LIBERIA coach is informational. None of this is regulated financial advice.
chat.emptyBody: Ask a concrete question about your situation, your expenses or your goals. It uses your real data and proposes actions step by step.
chat.demoBanner: Demo mode: the conversation activates after creating an account.
defaultSuggestions: What should I do this week?
How do I lower my financial stress?
Help me stick to my plan.

sidebar.demoToast: Demo mode: create an account to open a conversation.

header.title: Your financial plan
header.description: A concrete action plan to move forward week after week.

plan.aiNotReady: The AI plan is coming shortly.
plan.demoReason: Demo mode: create an account to generate a plan.
plan.demoEmptyTitle: The AI plan is reserved for accounts
plan.demoEmptyBody: Create your account to generate a personalised 30, 60 or 90-day plan based on your real data.

generate.description: The LIBERIA coach uses your real numbers (income, expenses, goals) to build a concrete action plan.
generate.archiveNotice: The current plan will be archived.
generate.footnote: Generation usually takes 10 to 30 seconds. You can close this window — the plan will appear as soon as it's ready.

30.label: 30 days
30.description: Short sprint: one clear, measurable goal.

60.label: 60 days
60.description: Two months to install new habits for the long run.

90.label: 90 days
90.description: Full quarter — the most solid transformation.

timeline.empty: No steps in this plan yet.

starter.fineprint: This plan is a frame. You'll be able to replace it with a personalised AI version once the coach is ready.
starter.demoReason: Demo mode: create an account to generate a plan.

transaction.description: Enter the amount and its frequency. You can edit any time.
transaction.label: Label

goal.description: Choose a tangible, reachable goal. You can adjust it.
goal.title: Title

list.demoBanner: Demo mode · read-only. Create your account to add your data.
list.demoBannerGoals: Demo mode · read-only. Create your account to manage your goals.
list.demoToastInfoTitle: Demo mode · create an account to save.
list.demoSaveError: Demo mode: sign in to save.
list.demoDeleteError: Demo mode: sign in to delete.
list.deleteConfirmGoal: Delete the goal « {title} »? This is permanent.
list.emptyIncomeDescription: Start with your main salary or recurring income.
list.emptyExpenseDescription: List your essential expenses then the non-essential ones.
list.emptyGoalsDescription: Set your first step: emergency fund, debt to pay off, project.

header.title: Your monthly budget
header.description: The overview: what comes in, what goes out, what's left to move forward.

header.title: Your income
header.description: Salary, freelance, allowances, side income — everything that comes in, sorted cleanly.

stats.sourcesHint: Add every source for a faithful calculation.

header.title: Your expenses
header.description: List your essential and non-essential expenses. No judgement, just for clarity.

stats.linesHint: You can edit or delete them any time.

header.title: Your financial goals
header.description: One clear goal beats ten good intentions. Move forward step by step.

billing.fineprint: Card required to start. Automatic billing at the end of the {days} days. Cancel any time.

feedback.successBody: Your access is being activated, this can take a few seconds.
feedback.cancelled: Payment cancelled. You can retry any time.

monthly.name: Monthly
monthly.description: Full LIBERIA access. Cancel any time from your account.

yearly.name: Yearly
yearly.description: That's ~9.99 CHF/month — about 60 CHF saved per year.

calm.label: Calm and reassuring
calm.description: Soft, no pressure. Pace beats performance.
